retry_reason: The function is not a wrapper; its own retry loop handles signaled fences. The get/put operations are unconditional and always succeed, so no retry of refcount operations is needed.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to ensure a valid (non-signaled) eviction fence exists by calling get, checking signaled status, and potentially triggering resume work. The refcount operations (get/put) are only incidental to safely access the fence's state; they are not the core purpose. No reference is passed to the caller.
